root.name: Successfully split Assets and Liabilities in slide 6 using Two Content layout
root.description: Evaluates whether slide 6 has been changed to a 'Two Content' layout and the Assets and Liabilities sections are correctly separated into two content placeholders.

children.name: Slide 6 layout changed to 'Two Content'
children.description: Checks if slide 6's layout has been changed to 'Two Content'.

children.name: Assets and Liabilities are split into two separate content areas
children.description: Checks that text referring to 'Assets' and 'Liabilities' is in two different content placeholders/boxes on slide 6.

children.name: No extraneous modifications made to slide 6
children.description: Checks that no changes other than layout and splitting Assets/Liabilities sections were performed on slide 6.

metadata.task: On slide 6. Change the slide layout to 'Two Content' and split the Assets and Liabilities sections into two separate content areas
